nodes.label: 5 Laws of Elegant Defense
nodes.rationale: Code should guide data so naturally that errors become impossible. Laws: Early Exit (guard clauses), Parse Don't Validate, Atomic Predictability, Fail Fast Fail Loud, Intentional Naming.

nodes.label: 5 Pillars of Intentional UI
nodes.rationale: Distinctive, memorable, intentional design to avoid generic AI slop aesthetics. Pillars: Typography with Character, Committed Color, Purposeful Motion, Brave Spatial Composition, Atmosphere and Depth.
